title: Platform Material Digital Application Ontology for Logistics and Supply Chain (LOG)
description: The PMD Logistics Application Ontology (LOG) is a BFO- and IOF-conformant ontology for logistics and supply chain management. It extends the PMD Core Ontology (PMDCo) and is adopted from the IOF Supply Chain Module. LOG covers organizations and roles, shipments, transport processes, facilities, agreements, and supply chain planning.
